headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks with Solid Fundamentals and 1 We Turn Down
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: Is HCA Healthcare (HCA) Still Attractive After A 60% One-Year Share Price Gain?
summary: If you are wondering whether HCA Healthcare's current share price still offers value, you are not alone. This article will unpack what the numbers suggest about where it stands today. With the stock at US$532.81 after returns of 6.2% over 30 days, 13.3% year to date and 59.7% over the past year, many investors are reassessing both its growth potential and the risks they are taking on at this level. Recent headlines around HCA Healthcare have focused on its ongoing role as a major US hospital...
